title: Remove CI Bypass Patterns (|| true) — Activate Fail-Closed Gates
description: Remove all instances of || true from GitHub Actions workflows and safety checks. Make CI fail-closed: tests must pass, security checks cannot be silenced.
blockers: Current CI allows security/test failures to be silenced with || true
This prevents fail-closed mandate from being enforced
P0-002 must complete before merging #27 and #28
acceptance_criteria: All || true patterns removed from scripts/ci-*.sh
safety and bandit checks now block PR merge on failure
All 797 tests pass (or are properly failed, not silenced)
GitHub Actions show green checks on main
notes: This task makes CI the gatekeeper. After this, no code can silently bypass security checks. Create a feature branch, update files, run tests locally, open PR to main, do not merge yourself.
